violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. Spray solution of vinegar is not an acceptable sanitizer utilize a quat or chlorine solution that can be tested for concentration with a wiping cloth.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use cups noted being reused as scoops in the chocolate chip bins.
STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean Scoops noted stored in an unprotected location. Container storing portion scoops has debris build up on bottom of bin.
